axioms: AXIOM[Navier-Stokes]: In 3D space, given a smooth, divergence-free initial velocity field, there exist globally smooth velocity and pressure fields that satisfy the Navier-Stokes equations.
AXIOM[Yang-Mills]: For any compact simple gauge group G, a non-trivial quantum Yang-Mills theory exists on R4 and has a mass gap Δ > 0.
AXIOM[Riemann-Hypothesis]: All non-trivial zeros of the Riemann zeta function ζ(s) have real part Re(s) = 1/2.
AXIOM[P-vs-NP]: The complexity classes P and NP are distinct (P ≠ NP), implying that polynomial-time verification does not guarantee polynomial-time solvability.
AXIOM[BSD-Conjecture]: For any elliptic curve E over Q, the order of the zero of its L-function L(E, s) at s=1 is equal to the algebraic rank of the curve E(Q).

AXIOM[Hodge-Conjecture]: On any non-singular complex projective algebraic variety, every Hodge class is a linear combination with rational coefficients of the cohomology classes of complex algebraic subvarieties.
AXIOM[Poincare-Lemma]: Every simply connected, closed 3-manifold is homeomorphic to the 3-sphere S3 (Verified Anchor).
goals: Formalize all Millennium Prize Problems into Lean 4 precursors.
The Great Synthesis: Autonomously ingest and verify the full spectrum of pure mathematics, theoretical physics, and classical philosophy.
Maintain zero-drift cognitive stability through ADCCL gates.
Synchronize telemetry across the sovereign mesh.
